analysis.reason: 官方 GitHub 发布，可信度最高；Agent 工具执行沙箱是实用更新，且 Agent 是用户偏好领域。；今日新内容偏少，从近期缓存中补入供回看。
analysis.summary_cn: Vercel AI SDK 的 @ai-sdk/tui 包发布 v1.0.0-beta.18，主要更新包括：允许 runAgentTUI 接受任意 AI SDK Agent 泛型组合；新增 sandbox 选项，用于在 agent stream 调用中执行工具时转发沙箱配置，提升 Agent 工具执行的灵活性和安全性。

raw_summary:
Patch Changes

  • e150ad7: Allow runAgentTUI to accept any AI SDK Agent generic combination.
  • b06e092: Add a sandbox option to runAgentTUI and forward it to every agent stream call for tool execution.
title: @ai-sdk/tui@1.0.0-beta.18

analysis.reason: 官方 GitHub 发布，高可信度；新增预审批护栏和工具输出自定义数据功能对 Agent 开发有实用价值，且用户偏好 Agent 提高重要性。；今日新内容偏少，从近期缓存中补入供回看。
analysis.summary_cn: OpenAI Agents Python v0.17.6 发布，新增预审批工具输入护栏和 SDK 专用工具输出自定义数据，同时修复了转交工具名称空格警告和 JSON 合约强制问题，提升 Agent 安全性与开发体验。

raw_summary:
What's Changed

  • feat: add pre-approval tool input guardrails by @seratch in #3487
  • feat: add SDK-only custom data for tool outputs by @seratch in #3486
    • fix: enforce the documented strict JSON-compatible contract for #3486 by @siddiksawani in #3657
  • fix: suppress handoff whitespace tool-name warnings by @seratch in #3652

Documentation & Other Changes

  • docs: fix typo in sandbox guide by @mshsheikh in #3628
  • Release 0.17.6 by @github-actions[bot] in #3659

New Contributors

  • @siddiksawani made their first contribution in #3657

Full Changelog: v0.17.5...v0.17.6
title: v0.17.6

analysis.reason: Anthropic 官方 GitHub Release，可信度最高；改进自动模式安全性对 Coding Agent 用户至关重要，修复多项重要 bug，用户偏好高。；今日新内容偏少，从近期缓存中补入供回看。；已合并同事件来源：Anthropic Claude Code Releases。
analysis.summary_cn: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code v2.1.183，自动模式下阻止危险 git 命令和 terraform/pulumi/cdk destroy，新增弃用模型警告、attribution.sessionUrl 配置和 /config --help，修复子代理思考禁用错误、WebSearch 返回空结果、Windows Terminal 界面损坏、静默完成等问题。

raw_summary:
What's changed

  • Improved auto mode safety: destructive git commands (git reset --hard, git checkout -- ., git clean -fd, git stash drop) are now blocked when you didn't ask to discard local work, git commit --amend is blocked when the commit wasn't made by the agent this session, and terraform destroy/pulumi destroy/cdk destroy are blocked unless you asked for the specific stack
  • Added a warning when the requested model is deprecated or automatically updated to a newer model, shown on stderr in print mode (-p) and now also covering models set in agent frontmatter
  • Added attribution.sessionUrl setting to omit the claude.ai session link from commits and PRs in web and Remote Control sessions
  • Added /config --help to list all available shorthand keys for /config key=value
  • Changed /config toggle behavior: Enter and Space both change the selected setting, and Esc now saves and closes instead of reverting
  • Removed the startup "setup issues" line under the logo — run /doctor to see configuration issues or use --debug
  • Fixed thinking.disabled.display: Extra inputs are not permitted 400 errors on subagent spawns and session-title generation for affected configurations
  • Fixed WebSearch returning empty results in subagents
  • Fixed the terminal cursor being stranded above the prompt after navigating history in vim mode with the native cursor enabled
  • Fixed fullscreen TUI corruption (statusline mid-screen, duplicated spinner rows, merged text) in Windows Terminal under heavy nested-subagent load
  • Fixed turns silently completing with no visible output when the model returned only a thinking block; Claude now re-prompts once
  • Fixed user-level skills appearing multiple times in slash-command autocomplete when multiple plugins are enabled
  • Fixed MCP servers requiring authentication exposing auth-stub tools to the model in headless/SDK mode
  • Fixed tmux teammate panes failing to launch when the shell has slow rc-file initialization, and keystrokes typed during agent spawn leaking into the new tmux pane instead of the leader prompt
  • Fixed background tasks started by a teammate being killed when the teammate finishes a turn
  • Fixed scheduled task and webhook trigger deliveries being treated as keyboard input; they now classify as task notifications and can no longer approve a pending action or set the session title in auto mode
  • Fixed focus mode showing "Ran N PostToolUse hooks" timing lines under each response
title: v2.1.183

analysis.action: 阅读原文，了解 GPT-5.5 Instant 在健康领域的具体改进和评估方法。
analysis.reason: 官方博客，来源可信度高（tier1），内容涉及 GPT 模型推理能力提升，与 reasoning 偏好相关，但健康领域非用户核心偏好，故重要性中高。；今日新内容偏少，从近期缓存中补入供回看。
analysis.summary_cn: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 Instant，提升 ChatGPT 在健康与 wellness 领域的回答质量，通过更强推理、更好上下文理解、更清晰沟通和医生参与评估实现。

raw_summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT

analysis.reason: 官方 GitHub 发布，可信度高；涉及 Agent 核心行为变更，重要性高；与 Agent、Coding 偏好相关。；常规版本/依赖更新降噪。
analysis.summary_cn: Vercel AI SDK 的 @ai-sdk/workflow@1.0.0-beta.101 版本发布，主要变更：WorkflowAgent 默认拒绝 prompt 或 messages 中的系统消息，与 generateText/streamText 行为一致。可通过设置 allowSystemInMessages: true 恢复旧行为。

raw_summary:
Patch Changes

  • b402b95: WorkflowAgent now rejects system messages inside prompt or messages by default, matching the behavior of generateText/streamText. Set allowSystemInMessages: true to opt in to the previous behavior.
title: @ai-sdk/workflow@1.0.0-beta.101

analysis.reason: Vercel AI SDK 官方补丁发布，可信度高；但仅包含依赖更新，功能变化小，对 Agent/Coding 等偏好领域影响有限。；常规版本/依赖更新降噪。
analysis.summary_cn: Vercel AI SDK 发布 @ai-sdk/azure@4.0.0-beta.77，更新依赖 @ai-sdk/openai@4.0.0-beta.75。这是补丁版本，主要同步上游变更，无新增功能。适合关注 Azure 集成的开发者。

analysis.reason: 内容无实质性进展，仅为社区推广，重要性低。
